comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Root cause: Ralph session_start/session_switch called syncCurrentLoopFromSession(...), which cleared currentLoop when the current session did not yet own the loop. That caused updateUI() to immediately clear the ralph widget/status, even while an active Ralph loop was still in progress. Fixed by preserving the current loop when session sync finds no owner, so the widget remains visible until the loop is actually cleared. Added service and adapter regressions, then verified with `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`.
